title: EDEN group
description: A named set of workers and/or other groups within an experiment. Membership resolves transitively; cycles MUST be rejected at write time per spec/v0/02-data-model.md §7.

group_id.description: Operator-supplied identifier; same grammar as `worker_id` (spec/v0/02-data-model.md §6.1). Reserved values (`admin`, `system`, `internal`) MUST be rejected by `register_group`.

items.description: Member id — either a registered `worker_id` or another `group_id` in the same experiment.
